name: Shield
author: Resonant Alpha
description: Local protection layer for capability enforcement, filesystem control, and security telemetry.

surfaces.label: Shield Monitor
surfaces.description: Inspect file guard, permissions, and security status.

workflowBoundaries.label: Local protection layer
workflowBoundaries.jobToBeDone: Monitor capability-sensitive local operations and surface security telemetry to the human.
workflowBoundaries.userValue: The human can inspect security posture and receive warnings without handing add-ons blanket trust.
nonGoals: Take custody of provider or wallet secrets

skills.name: Security posture review
skills.description: Explain capability, filesystem, and telemetry findings in human-actionable language.

connectors.name: Filesystem guard
connectors.description: Observes scoped filesystem paths and reports security-relevant events.

scripts.name: Shield guard preflight
scripts.description: Verify local guard configuration before enabling protection flows.
